event_claims.description: Providence and Worcester Railroad Company entered into a merger agreement with Genesee & Wyoming Inc. and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 12, 2016, Providence and Worcester Railroad Company (“PWRR” or the “Company”) entered into a merger agreement among the Company, Genesee & Wyoming Inc. (“G&W”) and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. (“Merger Sub”)

event_claims.description: The merger agreement provides for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company, with the Company surviving the merger.
event_claims.quote_text: providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company (the “merger”), with the Company surviving the merger

event_claims.description: The merger agreement provides for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company, with the Company surviving the merger.
event_claims.quote_text: providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company (the “merger”), with the Company surviving the merger

event_claims.description: The merger agreement provides for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company, with the Company surviving the merger.
event_claims.quote_text: providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company (the “merger”), with the Company surviving the merger

event_claims.description: Under the merger agreement, Merger Sub will merge with and into the Company, Merger Sub's separate corporate existence will cease, and the Company will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of G&W.
event_claims.quote_text: the Merger Agreement (as amended or modified from time to time, the “merger agreement”) by and among the Company, Genesee & Wyoming Inc. (“G&W”) and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. (“Merger Sub”), dated as of August 12, 2016 (including the plan of merger attached thereto), pursuant to which Merger Sub will merge with and into the Company (the “merger”), whereupon the separate corporate existence of Merger Sub will cease and the Company will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of G&W
